item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I think there's an interesting story here, but it's stretched too thinly over the prose. It's clear that you put a great deal of work and love put into this, but I think it may have stayed in the proverbial oven too long and gotten overwritten. There's a lot of fat that could be trimmed here, and consequently I found it difficult to properly engage with the work. You've got some solid concepts here, and they'd be carry a lot more punch if written in more concise terms.

Couple other nitpicks
– hide block

A couple of recurring technical issues I noticed were the misuse of "it's" (which should only be used for contractions) and an all-too-general use commas that further slowed the pace of reading.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Thank you very much!

Spoilers Answers
- Close
  • The wave and frequency mentions are meant to hint at SCP-4940 being psionic in nature, allowing it to accomplish the anomalous activities it does.
  • The info on SCP-4940-1 is classified to hide SCP-4940's latent personality and full sapience, for morale reasons, as well as the fact that it is a recent discovery, which raises more questions than what lower-level researchers should know about the company the object was found from.
  • It is not false. The information is included due to researchers presumably conducting tests allowing SCP-4940 to fully develop. It's implantation into a brain is an alternative route to it's development.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Aside from some typos, this is very well written. I actually expected this to be a meta article based on the title.

I'm left with some lingering questions though:

Spoilers
- Close
  • What's the significance of the wave function and frequencies?
  • Why is information on SCP-4940-1 classified Level 4?
  • Is the part about SCP-4940 forming its biomass into a human shape if it gains enough mass false?

item.title: Potential Formatting Error
item.content:encoded:
You don't need to state the Item # and Object Class twice.

EDIT: "SCP-4940is" and "SCP-4940begins" need spaces.

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded: This is the result of months of work, and I'm quite proud to release it. Thanks to a personal friend who did a lot of the initial proofreading and other help, and thanks to RockTeethMothEyes and Kakroom for additional proofreading.
